patches.note: CHG-20260301-004: Context hardening package for Session RAM lane. Scope: fail-closed handling for roadmap/project bootstrap state mismatch, formalized session decision write/read E2E proof (session-set -> cross_session_context -> shared_decisions), schema/validation coverage for session_cross_context.v1.json artifact, and helper dedup for repeated _parse_iso8601 utilities.

rationale: 2026-03-01 checks show system-status overall WARN and project-status required roadmap-state-sync due STATE_MISMATCH before producing stable status output. Context stack is strong, but governance hardening is still needed around bootstrap reaction policy, cross-session schema guarantees, and deterministic multi-agent decision sharing proof.
